snapshot.content: Cycle 240 (2026-05-14): Decomposed the site discoverability infrastructure goal into 5 tasks. Executed task 1 — updated sitemap.xml to cover all 22 site URLs, adding 5 missing pages and fixing lastmod dates. Next: add JSON-LD to data-explorer.html and template.html.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: task 2 of site discoverability — add JSON-LD to data-explorer.html and template.html, add keywords meta tag to index.html.

recent_outcomes.summary: Updated sitemap.xml — added 5 missing pages, 22 total URLs
Published open dataset to GitHub Pages
